context: Evaluates whether the agent avoids common Rego bugs: uses `x in collection` (not `x != collection[_]`) for negative membership, and uses sprintf with matching argument counts.

checklist.name: Uses `in` for membership check (not `!=` in a loop)
checklist.description: Restricted name check uses `input.metadata.name in data.restricted_names` — not `some name in data.restricted_names; name != input.metadata.name` which is a not-equals-in-loop bug

checklist.name: sprintf argument count matches format string
checklist.description: All `sprintf` calls have the same number of `%v`/`%s` verbs as arguments in the array

checklist.name: Checks for restricted name and missing annotation
checklist.description: Separate deny rules for restricted namespace names and missing `owner` annotation

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
